info.title: 211 Ontario - Search API
info.description: Search 211 Ontario resources using a range of parameters to filter the response

get.description: Returns a service at location record.

Searches an index of 211 Ontario resource service at location records. 

Records are returned in 'service-at-locationn' format, with all services and locations of the organization. For more options, use the POST method. 

The total number of records in the index matching the request is identified as "countAvailable" at the top of the response. The values set for each parameter are also returned at the top of the response.

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: one or more words to search for resources (note: to match all entered words, set searchMode to 'all'.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: city, county, zipcode or state to search for locations (note: set distance to restrict searches to number of miles from location. if searchWithinLocation set to true, resources within location's geographic boundary are returned.

parameters.name: distance
parameters.description: Format - int32. number of kilometers from entered location (note: if searchWithinLocation is set to 'true', distance is not applicable).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Format - int32. number of organization records to skip.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Format - int32. number of organization records to return.

parameters.name: searchWithinLocation
parameters.description: search for resources within geographic boundary of location.

parameters.name: searchMode
parameters.description: set to 'any' to match on one or more entered keywords, or set to 'all' to match on all entered keywords.

parameters.name: useGeocodeService
parameters.description: set to 'true' to geocode location for either distance or searchWithinLocation searches.

post.description:
Searches an index of 211 Ontario resource service at location records. 

Records are returned in 'service-at-locationn' format, with all services and locations of the organization.

The total number of records in the index matching the request is identified as "countAvailable" at the top of the response. The values set for each parameter are also returned at the top of the response.

Note: Active and Inactive organizations can be returned. Set the 'includeInactive' filter to true to return both active and inactive records. Default value is set to 'false', returning only active records.

field.description:
The name of the search field to filter on. The filter fields are:
list of filter fields here

value.description: The value to filter the field on. Refer to examples for value format and sample data values.

SearchFilter.description: SearchFilter value that identifies the field to filter and the value of the field to be filtered on

search.description:
Enter one or more keywords to search the repository. Set SearchMode to 'Any' to match on at least one entered
word, or SearchModel to 'All' to match on all words. If Hybrid search set to true, results will be returned
regardless of SearchMode.

searchWithinLocation.description: If set to true (and geocoding service set to true), search for all resources within the locations geoPolygonlkSearch within Locationearch

useGecodeService.description: Set to 'true' to use built-in geo service to get geocode point and geocode polygon data, for use with geo.distance and geo.intersects functions.

size.description: Number of results to be returned

includeTotalCount.description:
Include total number of results available for return. If Size is less than value returned by total count,
use Skip to get remaining results

filters.description:
Filters that include/exclude results. Filters include:
list here

facets.description: Facets returned with results that can be used to resubmit search with filter values

searchFields.description: List of fields that will be searched in 'simple text' search. Full list of fields is:

selectFields.description:
List of fields to return in search results. Full list of fields is:
list fields here

searchMode.description: Set to 'any' to match one or more entered search words in simple text search. Set to 'all' to match on all words.
